query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "grepseek: training search agents for direct corpus interaction" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) by providing a novel corpus (Linguistics Olympiad problems) specifically designed for and evaluated in the context of large language models, which directly supports the user's goal of extending search-agent training to the linguistics domain. It also meets criterion (e) by establishing the empirical population (LOPs) that serves as the canonical dataset for linguistics-focused LLM research, offering the necessary baseline and theoretical framework for the user'
